title.en: And the next scene also proves Ye Tian's thoughts-

content.en:
Rumble!!!

The battle in the void became more and more intense, and the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass finally ushered in the time of maturity.

I saw that the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass suddenly released a circle of light, and there was a trace of golden light mixed in the aperture, this kind of vision made Ye Tian believe that the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass had completely matured.

And the next scene also proves Ye Tian's thoughts-

Woohoo!!

Several Source Emperors rushed over from a distance, pointing directly at the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, and these Source Emperors were not the kind of weak Source Emperors, but relatively powerful Source Emperors, who seemed to have a bit of wisdom, so they seized this opportunity and made a move when the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass was just ripe.

"Look for death!"

"Look for death!"

The two Origin Ancestors in the void were furious, and the sharp arrows turned into blood and qi shot at those Origin Emperors, as if they were going to shoot those Origin Emperors.

"Good chance!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed and immediately teleported over.

He was not very far away from the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, and he had a super god-level space-time talent, how fast he was shuttling through space, in terms of short-distance shuttle, these Source Emperors were not as good as him at all.

Therefore, in an instant, Ye Tian came to the Seven Leaves Ancestral Blood Grass.

And the main energy of those two Source Emperors was fighting, and part of the energy was on those Source Emperors, so they didn't notice Ye Tian at all.

In addition, Ye Tian's shuttle was too fast, which was unexpected for them.

After all, in the long years of the Origin Realm, they had never seen such a super-god-level spatial talent, so they miscalculated.

Click!

Ye Tianyi pulled out the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, even if there was some damage to the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, he couldn't care about it at all.

He didn't have much time, he had to run away as soon as possible, or he would surely die.

After all, he snatched the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass from the hands of the two Origin Ancestors, which was no joke.

"Mole ants!"

The two Origin Ancestors sensed Ye Tian, and when they saw that Ye Tian was going to pull out the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, they were extremely angry, but because they were afraid of destroying the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, they did not attack Ye Tian with all their strength, but only launched two attacks comparable to the full force of the Source Emperor.

And Ye Tian instantly opened various means of defense, as well as the Chaos Origin Ancient Well.

Rumble!!!

The attack of the two Origin Ancestors landed on the Chaos Origin Ancient Well, instantly shaking the Chaos Origin Ancient Well and trembling a few times, but it was not broken, it just flew Ye Tianzhen out.

"What, not dead?"

"Impossible, how can a mere source king-level outlier not die?"

The two Origin Ancestors were unbelievable.

Although they didn't know Ye Tian's origin, their aura was only equivalent to the limit of the Source King, but the means were a little weirder, but they wouldn't be able to block the blow they casually used to match the full strength of the Source Emperor!

And taking advantage of the moment when the two Origin Ancestors were stunned, Ye Tian exerted his rare splitting talent.

Whew!!!

A clone split apart and kept fleeing in all directions.

Once the splitting talent is cast, Ye Tian's strength will be reduced indefinitely, although this is a very weak talent, but at this moment it is an excellent talent to help Ye Tian escape.

Because his strength is undoubtedly an ant in front of the two Origin Ancestors, it doesn't matter how weakened his strength is.

And splitting out so many clones at once, and escaping through the space in all directions, it was enough to disperse the attack power of the two Origin Ancestors.

If it was the supreme of the main space of the universe, pay attention to freezing time and space, and even chase down various spaces with a single thought, it would be impossible for Ye Tian to escape, but the origin ancestor of the origin realm could not do this.

This is also the reason why Ye Tian dared to make a move!

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian's deity and one by one doppelgangers fled, and the two origin ancestors were extremely angry, chasing and killing separately, annihilating one of the doppelgangers.

......

Half an hour later.

Somewhere in the Origin Realm, a figure emerged from the space, and immediately drilled into the depths of the earth, and then concealed its breath.

This figure is Ye Tian.

"It's so dangerous, it's a little underestimated Yuan Zu, and I almost can't escape. There are so many doppelgangers, but they were annihilated by these two origin ancestors, fortunately, some doppelgangers were used to lure away these two source ancestors, otherwise once the body died, it would really be dead. "

Ye Tian said happily.

However, he was annihilated ninety out of eight doppelgangers, and he was seriously injured, after all, it was his own power that was split, not just divine power, if the divine power was consumed, it was easy to recover, but now such a loss is equivalent to the annihilation of the physical body.

If it weren't for the loss caused by Ye Tian's ability to use the splitting talent, otherwise he would have been annihilated by nine out of eight of his physical body, which would be equivalent to being seriously injured and dying.

"Let's recover first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he turned on the time acceleration and slowly recovered his body.

A year later.

Ye Tian was out of the customs, and with the help of time acceleration, he had already completely recovered his body, and of course he had spent a lot of rare treasures.

"Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, it's time to study it, this is a treasure I worked so hard to get, I hope it will be of great use to me!"

Ye Tian carefully took out the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, and arranged various formations around him to isolate the aura.

Then, Ye Tian studied the seven-leaf ancestral blood grass and tested the effect of the seven-leaf ancestral blood grass.

A few days later, Ye Tian almost understood the effect of the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass.

To put it simply, the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass can increase the level of life.

"Those two Origin Ancestors should be the sixth-order peak life level, they are all going to snatch the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, obviously the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass is of great use to the sixth-order peak life, and it may be able to help them break the life limit. And I'm also a sixth-order life, maybe I can use the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass to advance my life level to the seventh order!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Seventh-order life!

That was a life level that even the Lord of the Yuan Gu hadn't stepped into, and he had also cultivated the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, once he reached the seventh-order life level, his true physical realm was comparable to the seventh-order peak or even the eighth-order life.

Thinking of this, Ye Tian was excited.

So, he swallowed the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass in one gulp, and ran the sixth layer of the Tianyuan True Method.

The seventh layer of the Tianyuan True Method was flawed, so he naturally wouldn't go to cultivate, but the sixth layer of the exercise was intact, which could completely help him quickly absorb the energy of the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass.

Moreover, this time, he used the power of the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass to forcibly break through the life level limit, not using the exercises to break through, so he didn't care about the level of the exercises.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian's vitality is increasing at an incredible speed, and hundreds of trillions of cells are also evolving towards a new level.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

According to this progress, he may really be able to break the restriction of the life level and step into the seventh-order life level in the cosmic god realm.
